message:
fix: show user GitHub avatar in AI missions chat (#3766) (#3775)

Display the user's GitHub profile picture next to their messages in the
AI missions chat, matching the avatar shown on the profile button. Falls
back to the generic User icon when no avatar URL is available.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
